discharge_requirements: Represent a distinct parent-basin carrier and state
Freeze a causal parent-context discriminator rather than a support proxy
Complete a dedicated lane or cycle with the required controls
record.disposition: Treat parent context as absent and the registered reduced-support cell as a bounded support contrast only
record.source_description: The fixture has no independently represented parent basin; its parent-context-contrast changes absolute environmental support while preserving the declared score relation
